Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephanie Matthews in Propria Persona.

Ms. Matthews stated that the only asset is the house and the furniture in it, that she is the only Beneficiary of George, that the house is free and clear, that there is no debt and that the Decedent received no public benefits. Ms. Matthews also stated that she has an attachment of eight letters that went out, that she is using the Nolo Press book, that the inventory and appraisal needs to be done in four months, that she needs to notice the Franchise Tax Board and the Assessor's Office, that she is using a Broker to sell the house and that she has twelve months to close the estate. In addition, Ms. Matthews stated that the estimated value of the house is $700,000.00 and that the house is a single family residence. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $700,000.00 is required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for October 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for December 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Jung. Not reported.
